items.content_html:
Gold is completing Wave 2 correction and preparing for a powerful Wave 3 impulse move higher.

Current price: $5,112 (March 4, 2026)

Wave Structure (Daily):

  • Waves 1-2 completed ✅
  • Wave 3 in progress — sub-waves (i)(ii)(iii)(iv) visible
  • Wave (v) of 3 targets imminent

Price Targets:

  • 🎯 Target 1 — $5,745 (FE 100.0) — primary target, Wave 3 completion
  • 🎯 Target 2 — $6,240 (FE 161.8) — extended Wave 3 scenario

Macro backdrop: New Fed leadership cycle adds uncertainty. Historically, gold performs strongly during Fed transition periods. Silver is closely tracking gold with correlation tightening over the past 30 days.

Method: Elliott Wave + Fibonacci Extensions + Dow Theory

by Alex ManVal — analysis since 2008. Not a trading recommendation.
